message:
fix(quorum): length-prefix node IDs in SignatureSet::canonical_bytes

Add u32 LE length prefix before each node_id in the canonical byte
representation. Without a delimiter or length prefix, node_id strings
of different lengths could produce colliding canonical representations
(e.g., node "ab" + sig could collide with node "a" + "b"-prefixed sig),
undermining signature verification integrity.

Consistent with the same length-prefixing approach used in
fcp-registry's signature_message().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
